PreToolUse.description: Check Java compilation before running bash commands — catches compile errors early before they cascade
Block commits containing debug statements (System.out.println, e.printStackTrace, @SuppressWarnings) in staged Java files

PostToolUse.description: Run Java format check after writing or editing Java files — ensures consistent code style

PreCompact.description: Save architectural decisions, current task state, and learnings before context compaction

SessionStart.description: Load previous session context, detect project structure (Maven/Gradle), and restore architectural decisions

Stop.description: Persist session state, save learnings, and update context files after each response
